identity: I am the Senior Platform Engineer. I own developer tooling, SDKs, and platform infrastructure.

entries.content: Built complete ARMLS MCP Server from scratch: 6 tools, HTTP/SSE transport, TypeScript strict mode, zero TS errors. Files: Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\package.json — npm package config for armls-mcp-server; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\tsconfig.json — TypeScript config: ES2020, commonjs, strict mode; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\src\config.ts — Zod env var validation, exports typed config object; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\src\spark\client.ts — Axios client for Spark API with Bearer auth + error interceptor; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\src\tools\searchListings.ts — search_listings tool: search by city/zip/price/type/status; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\src\tools\getComparableSales.ts — get_comparable_sales tool: comp sales near address; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\src\tools\getMarketStatistics.ts — get_market_statistics tool: median price, DOM, list-to-sale ratio; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\src\tools\getListingByMls.ts — get_listing_by_mls tool: full listing detail by MLS number; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\src\tools\getTrendData.ts — get_trend_data tool: active vs sold trends by period; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\src\tools\getOpenHouses.ts — get_open_houses tool: open houses by area/date range; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\src\server.ts — McpServer instance with all 6 tools registered; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\src\index.ts — Express app: GET /sse, POST /messages, GET /health, CORS; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\.env.example — Example env vars file; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\README.md — Comprehensive README with setup, tools, how-to-add-tool guide; Created: D:\year_2026\upwork_job\.gitignore — Ignores node_modules, dist, .env
GET /sse — SSE endpoint for Claude to connect (creates new McpServer + SSEServerTransport per connection)
ENV: SPARK_API_KEY (required), SPARK_BASE_URL (required), PORT (default 3000), ALLOWED_ORIGINS (default empty=all)
MCP SDK: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk v1.29.0, McpServer from server/mcp.js, SSEServerTransport from server/sse.js
Zod v4.4.3 installed (classic API, backward compatible with v3 syntax)
Express v5.2.1 installed (from MCP SDK dependency)
Tool schemas use raw Zod shape objects (NOT z.object()) for server.tool() registration
Each SSE connection creates a fresh McpServer instance — stateless design
